calls.query: {"strategic_intent": "Read predict.md and AGENTS.md to understand the prompt contract and expected output files for the prediction cell.", "summary": "I will read `.github/prompts/predict.md` and `AGENTS.md` to understand what output files are required for the prediction cell and what process I should follow to fulfill this request.", "title": "Reading Documentation"}
uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73281677 --event evt-petition-disposition

{"strategic_intent": "Read inputs for prediction: schemas, event definition, snapshot, and document definitions.", "summary": "I will read the necessary provisioned inputs to prepare for the prediction: the prediction schema, the event definition, the docket snapshot, the documents index, and the context (mode).", "title": "Reading Provisioned Inputs"}

{"strategic_intent": "Read the Questions Presented and Brief in Opposition to understand the legal issue.", "summary": "I will read the Questions Presented and Brief in Opposition from the case record to understand the legal issue and arguments in the cert petition, which will help determine the probability of a grant.", "title": "Reading Case Documents"}

{"strategic_intent": "Read the argument section of the Brief in Opposition to assess the government's position and likelihood of a grant.", "summary": "I will read the argument section of the Brief in Opposition to understand the context of the legal issue, specifically looking for prior cases on the same issue (such as Johnson or Schneider) and whether the issue is recurring or definitively settled, which impacts the cert grant probability.", "title": "Analyzing the Brief in Opposition"}
uv run fedcourts query "cert denied Johnson 25-682 CAAF firearms indorsement"

{"strategic_intent": "Write the output files and validate them.", "summary": "I will write the prediction.json, reasoning.md, retrieval.md, and tooling.json files to the specified output directory, then validate the JSON files using the `fedcourts validate data` command.", "title": "Writing Outputs"}
